domain: Slovenian Idrija bobbin lace pricking + motif catalog (Slovenian klekljanje tradition since 1696; UNESCO ICH; 40+ canonical motif templates — peonies, hearts, cradles, snowflakes; pricking template specifies bobbin-crossings + twists; defect repair by re-routing individual bobbin path)
specific_mechanism: IDRIJA-LACE-DEFECT: graph-minor canonical-motif defect detector for per-head attention. (1) Treat per-head attention pattern (top-k edges per row) as bobbin-crossings graph G_head: nodes=tokens, edges=attention edges ≥ τ. (2) Maintain canonical motif catalog M={peony, heart, cradle, ...} — 40 graph-minor templates extracted from healthy-model attention patterns. (3) Per-row defect detection: check graph-minor isomorphism G_head vs each m ∈ M; flag rows where signature differs from all motifs by ≥ δ. (4) Repair: per-row attention edges permuted by π_repair learned to route toward nearest canonical motif. (5) Bobbin-path = attention edge; pricking = canonical motif catalog; defect-flag = graph-minor mismatch.
llm_application: IDRIJA-LACE-DEFECT graph-minor canonical-motif catalog defect detector + per-row permutation re-route repair for attention. Differs from R475 MAEDEUP-INVARIANT (crossing-number invariant J on per-head attention pattern with 30-knot catalog — different — knot-crossing not graph-minor on attention graph). Differs from TOHA 2504.10063 (topological divergence on attention graphs for hallucination — closest but no motif catalog, no per-row repair). T3former 2510.13789 (different — temporal graph not LLM attention). TIGT 2402.02005 (different — graph isomorphism transformer not attention defect). Surgical Repair Collapsed Heads 2603.09616 (different — per-head whole-head repair not per-row motif). Differs from R451 NGATU-DEFECT (RoPE phase cohomology), R436 HUTSUL-PYSANKA (4-fold equivariance), R425 NDEBELE-TRIANGLE (boundary locus), R103 KNOT-CoT (CoT trajectory) by GRAPH-MINOR + 40-MOTIF CANONICAL CATALOG + PER-ROW PERMUTATION REPAIR.
novelty_claim: TOHA + T3former + TIGT + Attention Head Intervention cover topological attention paradigm. IDRIJA-LACE-DEFECT adds (a) graph-minor isomorphism on per-head attention graph + (b) 40-motif canonical catalog + (c) per-row permutation re-route repair. Recombination — graph-minor isomorphism + attention combined is borderline-lookup.
content_words: permutation re-route repair toward nearest minor

llm_side: permutation re-route repair toward nearest minor
